subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou, O Leaf, inasmuch as thou hast sought out the Divine Lote-Tree, hast attained unto it, hast dwelt in its vicinity and beneath its shade, and hast hearkened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک یا ورقه بما قصدت السدره و فزت بها و سکنت فی جوارها و ظلها و سمعت
